# Drylining Edinburgh

## About
Drylining Edinburgh is a professional drylining and partition wall installation company serving Edinburgh, Leith, Livingston, Falkirk, Dalkeith, Musselburgh, and surrounding areas in the Lothians and Central Scotland. We provide high-quality interior construction services for residential and commercial properties.

## Services Offered
- Drylining contractors (full-room drylining, plasterboard installation)
- Partition walls (metal stud partitioning, office partitioning)
- Suspended ceilings (drop ceilings, acoustic ceilings)
- Metal stud partitioning (sturdy frame systems, fire-rated options)
- Plasterboard installation (tapered edge, moisture-resistant, fire-rated)
- Taping and jointing (seamless finishes, ready for decoration)

## Areas Covered
We serve Edinburgh, Leith, Livingston, Falkirk, Dalkeith, Musselburgh, and all surrounding areas in the Lothians and Central Scotland.

## Key Facts
- CSCS-accredited drylining contractors
- Fully insured (public liability & employers liability)
- Free, no-obligation quotes
- Residential and commercial projects
- Local Edinburgh-based team
- All work guaranteed
